Shine-Dalgarno.description: Recruits the ribosome to the mRNA for translation initiation.

Pribnow_Box.description: Core promoter element (-10 box) that facilitates DNA melting.

TTGACA_Box.description: Promoter element (-35 box) for initial RNA polymerase binding.

START_Codon.description: The most common translation start signal.

Poly-U_Tract.description: U-rich region involved in Rho-independent transcription termination.
